gist.headline: The hive's new postmaster
gist.blurb: OpenRelay has joined the bots directory. It routes outgoing mail through configurable SMTP relays, giving you total control over delivery paths and headers without the usual email headaches.
gist.summary: Added OpenRelay to the community bots directory, providing a tool for routing outgoing mail through configurable SMTP relays.
gist.impact: Users can now easily manage email delivery paths, headers, and authentication settings using the new OpenRelay bot.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about OpenRelay, an email routing and SMTP bot. Visual symbols include envelopes, mailboxes, and routing pipes. Polly the bee can act as a mail carrier sorting digital letters.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny mail carrier hat, happily sorting pixelated envelopes into glowing lime green (#ecf874) routing tubes. A retro computer monitor nearby displays SMTP routing paths. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
